source.sqlReaderQuery:
Select  FirstName, LastName, EmployeeId, LocationDesc as BranchLocation, LocationCode, 
case when LocationCode in ('120','068','083','111','118','RENNC','RENG') then 'Y' else 'N' end as [Soft Toe]
from EDW.DIM_HR_employee 
where PositionStatus='Active' and CurrentRecordflag='Y'
and locationCode not in ('029','042','044','045','058','072')
and JobTitleDescription  in (
'Manager, Regional Operations',
'Trainer, Install',
'Chief Operating Officer',
'Associate Garage Installer',
'Bath Lead',
'Bath Tech',
'Drywall Finisher',
'Finalization Team Supervisor',
'In-House Labor',
'In-House Service & Installation',
'Installation Helper',

'Safety & Fleet Specialist',
'Senior Field Supervisor',
'Senior Manager, Engineering & Manufacturing',
'Shop Maintenance Associate',
'Sr. Manager, Operations',
'Supply Chain Manager',
'SVP, Operations',
'Technical Reviewer',
'Territory Operations Manager',
'VP of Operations',
'Windows Production Manager',
'Director, Safety and Fleet',

'Sr. Associate, Regional EHS',
